response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 10% below share threshold, but our critical islanded state (37% SoC, ~22 min autonomy) and network-wide deficit crisis mandate all outbound sharing suspension until grid reconnection or SoC recovery to >80%; cannot risk cascade failure.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.95, distrusted_peers=['r1c1'].
Your latest belief: Islanded critical SoC (37%, ~22 min autonomy). Network-wide deficit crisis. R2c2 flagged distrusted by r1c1. All outbound sharing suspended to prevent battery depletion and cascade failure. Aggregator must prioritize grid reconnection as only viable recovery path. No new commitments until SoC > 80%..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
